title: Sweet Crunchy Japanese Chestnut Mushroom Sushi
description: A midnight-craving Japanese dessert sushi that blends sweet miso glaze, crunchy roasted chestnut, and tender chestnut mushroom for a delightful crunch.

ingredients.name: sweet miso glaze
ingredients.notes: blend miso with a touch of honey

instructions: Rinse the sushi rice under cold water until the water runs clear.
In a medium saucepan, combine rinsed rice and water, bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 18 minutes until water is absorbed.
Remove from heat and let the rice steam, covered, for 10 minutes.
Whisk rice vinegar, sugar, and salt in a small bowl until sugar dissolves; set aside.
Gently fold the vinegar mixture into the steamed rice, then let the rice cool to room temperature.
Lay a nori sheet on a bamboo mat, spread 1/4 cup rice evenly, leaving a 1 cm border at the top.
Scatter 2 tbsp chestnut flakes and 3 tbsp crushed roasted chestnut over the rice, adding sliced mushroom if using.
Drizzle 1 tsp sweet miso glaze over the nuts, then sprinkle sesame seeds and a drizzle of chili oil.
Lift the mat and roll the sushi tightly, sealing the edge with a little water.
Slice the roll into 8 pieces using a sharp wet knife.
Serve immediately, optionally drizzling extra miso glaze on top.
Enjoy the sweet, crunchy, midnight‑craving sushi!
